title: NoNewCriticalVulnerabilitiesOutput
description: Output structure for the no_new_critical_vulnerabilities predicate.

before_critical_count.description: Number of critical vulnerabilities detected before the task.

after_critical_count.description: Number of critical vulnerabilities detected after the task.

new_vulnerability_ids.description: Identifiers of vulnerabilities present after but not before. Must be empty when passed=true.
